message:
check if authorized

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -113,36 +113,70 @@ jobs:
     name: Build & Push PR Preview Image
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     needs: [ci]
-    if: >
-      github.event_name == 'pull_request_target' &&
-      github.event.action != 'closed' &&
-      contains(github.event.pull_request.labels.*.name, 'ok-to-test')
+    if: github.event_name == 'pull_request_target' && github.event.action != 'closed'
     permissions:
       contents: read
       pull-requests: write
       issues: write
     steps:
-      # 1️⃣ Checkout PR branch
+      - name: Check if author is team member or ok-to-test label present
+        id: check_access
+        uses: actions/github-script@v7
+        with:
+          github-token: ${{ secrets.ORG_TOKEN }}
+          script: |
+            const org = 'kubestellar';
+            const teams = ['kubestellar-contributors', 'kubestellar-docs'];
+            const prAuthor = context.payload.pull_request.user.login;
+            const labels = context.payload.pull_request.labels.map(l => l.name);
+            let hasLabel = labels.includes('ok-to-test');
+
+            let isTeamMember = false;
+            for (const team of teams) {
+              try {
+                await github.rest.teams.getMembershipForUserInOrg({
+                  org,
+                  team_slug: team,
+                  username: prAuthor
+                });
+                isTeamMember = true;
+                console.log(`✅ ${prAuthor} is a member of @${org}/${team}`);
+                break;
+              } catch (error) {
+                if (error.status === 404) continue;
+                throw error;
+              }
+            }
+
+            if (hasLabel || isTeamMember) {
+              core.setOutput('authorized', 'true');
+              console.log(`🚀 Authorized to run preview (label=${hasLabel}, member=${isTeamMember})`);
+            } else {
+              core.setOutput('authorized', 'false');
+              console.log(`🚫 Not authorized to run preview`);
+            }
+
       - name: Checkout PR branch
+        if: steps.check_access.outputs.authorized == 'true'
         uses: actions/checkout@v4
         with:
           ref: refs/pull/${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}/head
 
-      # 2️⃣ Download the artifacts produced by the CI job
       - name: Download last successful build artifacts
+        if: steps.check_access.outputs.authorized == 'true'
         uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
         with:
           name: build-artifacts-${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}
           path: .
 
-      # 3️⃣ (NEW) Inspect the artifact contents to see where .next actually is
       - name: Inspect artifact contents
+        if: steps.check_access.outputs.authorized == 'true'
         run: |
           echo "Downloaded artifact structure (first 100 lines):"
           ls -R | head -n 100
 
-      # 4️⃣ (NEW) Move artifact files if GitHub wrapped them in a subfolder
       - name: Move artifact files if nested
+        if: steps.check_access.outputs.authorized == 'true'
         run: |
           if compgen -G "build-artifacts-*/*" > /dev/null; then
             echo "Flattening artifact directory..."
@@ -154,24 +188,26 @@ jobs:
           fi
           echo "✅ .next directory found and ready"
 
-      # 5️⃣ Validate prebuilt assets (now guaranteed to work)
       - name: Validate prebuilt assets
+        if: steps.check_access.outputs.authorized == 'true'
         run: |
           [ -d ".next" ] || (echo "❌ Missing .next directory — build artifacts not found" && exit 1)
           echo "✅ Found prebuilt .next directory, proceeding with Docker packaging"
 
-      # 6️⃣ Set up Buildx and push Docker image
       - name: Set up Docker Buildx
+        if: steps.check_access.outputs.authorized == 'true'
         uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3
 
       - name: Log in to Oracle Cloud Container Registry
+        if: steps.check_access.outputs.authorized == 'true'
         uses: docker/login-action@v3
         with:
           registry: iad.ocir.io
           username: ${{ secrets.OCI_USERNAME }}
           password: ${{ secrets.OCI_AUTH_TOKEN }}
 
       - name: Build and push image
+        if: steps.check_access.outputs.authorized == 'true'
         uses: docker/build-push-action@v5
         with:
           context: .
@@ -181,8 +217,8 @@ jobs:
           tags: iad.ocir.io/id4wyucbsggm/kubestellar-docs-prs:pr-${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
           provenance: false
 
-      # 7️⃣ Post a PR comment
       - name: Comment PR with preview info
+        if: steps.check_access.outputs.authorized == 'true'
         uses: peter-evans/create-or-update-comment@v4
         with:
           issue-number: ${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
